title: OtpSent
description: Event: `otp_sent`. Acknowledgement that an OTP code has been dispatched to the user via the chosen delivery channel. The client should update the UI to prompt the user to enter the code they received.

requestId.description: Echoes the `requestId` from the originating action.
The request ID this OTP delivery belongs to.

channel.description: The channel through which the OTP was delivered.

maskedDestination.description: Partially masked destination address for display in the UI (e.g. `j***@example.com` or `+1 ***-***-4567`). Sufficient for the user to recognize their own address without exposing it fully.

timestamp.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the event was emitted.
